title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Truck Driver Shortage Signals Freight Logistics Stress
thesis: Rising searches for truck driver shortages often precede elevated freight costs and supply chain delays. Logistics disruptions pressure industrial sector earnings and margins.
signal_logic: Enter short XLI if weekly Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' rises 30% WoW
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLI if weekly Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' rises 30% WoW Exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if trend drops below 10% WoW gain
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Truck driver shortage is a frequent news and search theme, with weekly volatility in search interest.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' signals freight logistics stress
schema.behavior: Rising searches for truck driver shortages often precede elevated freight costs and supply chain delays.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics disruptions pressure industrial sector earnings and margins.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if weekly Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' rises 30% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if trend drops below 10% WoW gain

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Truck driver shortage is a frequent news and search theme, with weekly volatility in search interest.
